heading: Environmental protection mission
label: 2316 Environmental protection mission
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 1990, and not as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 1986 which comprises this chapter.
“Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of Pub. L. 101–640section 2201 of this title

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: The Secretary shall include environmental protection as one of the primary missions of the Corps of Engineers in planning, designing, constructing, operating, and maintaining water resources projects.
existing Corps of Engineers’ authorities, including its authorities with respect to navigation and flood control;
pending Corps of Engineers permit applications or pending lawsuits involving permits or water resources projects; or
the application of public interest review procedures for Corps of Engineers permits.
